meta.title: Casa Concierge PDC — Property Management, Playa del Carmen
meta.description: We manage your vacation property in the Riviera Maya. Guests, Airbnb, cleaning, maintenance and monthly reports. We only charge on your rental income.

hero.headline: Your property in paradise, fully managed.
hero.subheadline: Professional vacation property management in Playa del Carmen and the Riviera Maya. Full transparency, modern technology, local team.

problem.title: Why investors need us
problem.subtitle: The problem we solve every day.
problem.pain1_desc: When something breaks or a guest has a problem, there's no one to call who will actually show up.
problem.pain2_desc: Owners have no reliable way to know the occupancy, income, or condition of their property.
problem.pain3_desc: Many properties sit idle for weeks because owners don't know how to list on Airbnb or Booking.com.
problem.pain4_desc: Horror stories of local managers disappearing with deposits or neglecting properties are common in this market.
problem.solution: We're your dedicated, bilingual, local team. We manage, promote, and care for your property as if it were our own.

services.title: Our Plans
services.subtitle: You earn, we earn. If your property earns nothing, you pay nothing beyond the minimum.

tier1.name: Essential
tier1.description: For owners who need peace of mind and local eyes.
features: Monthly property inspection (1 visit/month with photo report)

tier2.name: Full Management
tier2.description: Full hands-off operation. Our most popular plan.
features: Dynamic pricing management by season and demand
Property featured on our website portal

tier3.name: Premium Concierge
tier3.description: Optimized returns with a fully white-glove service.
features: Priority response (4 hours, 7 days a week)
Full marketing package: social media, email, portal
Dedicated listing page with custom URL
Access to our acquisition consulting network

services.disclaimer: * Results may vary by season, location, property features, and market conditions. Figures shown are estimates based on similar properties and do not constitute a guarantee of income.
services.faq_alt_payment_q: Can I pay by transfer or cash?
services.faq_alt_payment_a: Our primary payment method is credit/debit card through our secure platform. If you'd like to explore alternative payment methods (SPEI transfer, international wire), contact us directly to arrange a prior written agreement. Alternative methods are subject to availability and approval, and the same plan rates and conditions apply.

addons.name: Guest welcome kit (branded, with local tips)

comparison.title: How We Compare
comparison.subtitle: See exactly how our service stacks up against the alternatives.

comp1.takeaway: A broker gets you into the property. We make the property work for you every single month after that. They're not competitors — they serve different phases. We even partner with brokers and pay referral fees when clients need to buy.

comp2.takeaway: If a well-managed property earns $3,000/month and a poorly self-managed one earns $1,800/month, our fee costs far less than the $1,200 in lost income. We don't just manage — we optimize.

rows.them: Owner handles it (any hour, any timezone)
rows.us: We handle it, 7 days a week

comp3.takeaway: Big companies offer coverage. We offer commitment. When you send us a message, the person who physically walked through your property last week is the one answering.

rows.us: Directly with us — always the same people

rows.them: Office staff, rarely at your property

rows.us: One clear percentage, one small minimum

rows.them: Low — it's a job to their staff
rows.us: High — this is our business and reputation
ES, EN, FR, RU, PT, DE

comp4.takeaway: Many investors buy a property and then let it sit. That's money left on the table every single month, and your property deteriorates without oversight.

about.title: Who We Are
about.subtitle: A dedicated, local, bilingual team.
about.description: We're a couple who lives in Playa del Carmen and loves this city. We combine expertise in technology and hospitality to deliver a property management service that actually works.
about.husband_role: Software Engineer — Platform development, digital infrastructure, and reporting.
about.wife_role: Client Relations — Owner communication, guest coordination, cleaning, and oversight.
about.value1_desc: No hidden fees. Detailed monthly reports. You'll know exactly what's happening with your property.
about.value2_desc: We're here. We respond. We show up. It's that simple.
about.value3_desc: We know every street, every contractor, every market trend in the Riviera Maya.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: In 5 simple steps, your property will be generating income.
howItWorks.step1_desc: Select the service level that best fits your needs.
howItWorks.step2_desc: Fast, secure payment through our platform.
howItWorks.step3_desc: We conduct an initial inspection and get everything ready.
howItWorks.step4_desc: We list, manage guests, coordinate cleanings, and handle maintenance.
howItWorks.step5_desc: Every month you receive a detailed report and your rental earnings.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: The trust of our property owners is our best calling card.
testimonials.coming_soon: We're collecting testimonials from our first clients. They'll be here soon!

acquisition.title: Thinking of investing in the Riviera Maya?
acquisition.subtitle: We help you find the perfect property.
acquisition.description: We offer consulting and referrals to vetted local agencies. We accompany you to property visits and advise on neighborhoods, ROI potential, and property condition.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We respond within 24 hours.
contact.name: Name
contact.age_confirm: I confirm that I am 18 years of age or older.

footer.tagline: Professional property management in Playa del Carmen and the Riviera Maya.
footer.whatsapp_disclaimer: WhatsApp communications are operational only. For formal requests or claims: info@casaconciergepdc.com
